reviewed_items.reviewer_notes: All gates passed. Gate 1 (Dead Code): Function is registered as P2P RPC handler in rpc.go:55 and actively called from P2P network. Gate 2 (Trust Boundary): Attack requires only untrusted P2P peer request; no compromised trusted component needed. Gate 3 (Code Verification): Code reading is factually correct—at rpc_data_column_sidecars_by_range.go:164-166, when quota reaches 0, the function returns immediately, exiting both the sidecar loop (L150) and block loop (L138), leaving remaining sidecars of the current block unsent. Gate 4 (Exploitability): An attacker can trigger this via P2P by requesting a large range that exhausts quota mid-block (e.g., request slots 1-100 with multiple columns; if quota=250 and blocks have 3 sidecars each, quota exhausts at block 84 after sending 2 sidecars, leaving the 3rd unsent). This causes data availability failures as peers receive incomplete sidecar sets below the PeerDAS reconstruction threshold, wasting bandwidth and breaking sync. Gate 5 (Spec Cross-Reference): 01e_PARTIAL_W2B3_1771748669.json PROP-6a4369e9-inv-043 line 1097-1112 requires 'All sidecars of a block must be included in by_range response if any sidecar is included' with assertion 'any_sidecar_included(block, resp) => all_sidecars_included(block, resp)'. Code violates this atomicity requirement. Gate 6 (Scope Check): P2P network component and Fusaka-specific PeerDAS code, fully in-scope. Severity: Original MEDIUM is appropriate—Prysm has 31% CL share, single-client bug affecting >5% network threshold. An attacker can trigger this via P2P requests by crafting range parameters that exhaust quota mid-block, causing the peer to receive incomplete data column sets for the final block, resulting in reconstruction failure and wasted bandwidth as the partial set falls below PeerDAS threshold required for data availability.
reviewed_items.spec_reference: All sidecars of a block must be included in by_range response if any sidecar is included. (01e_PARTIAL_W2B3_1771748669.json:1097-1112, PROP-6a4369e9-inv-043)
